tools.name: trace_create_workspace
tools.description: Create an isolated, disposable workspace (its own sandbox). Pays for container time over x402: provide a signed x402 payload as x_payment. Without x_payment the tool returns the price + payment terms. Returns a capability_token shown ONCE — pass it to the other tools.

tools.name: trace_search
tools.description: Search a workspace: semantic, cross-modal (text→image), or reverse-image. Provide query OR image_b64. Returns ranked hits with locators.

tools.name: trace_ingest_batch
tools.description: Ingest one or more documents into a workspace. Each: {name, text OR content_b64, mime?}.

tools.name: trace_get_passage
tools.description: Fetch one item's metadata/content from a workspace by item id.

tools.name: trace_get_usage
tools.description: Workspace usage: TTL remaining, spend, search/ingest counts, status.

tools.name: trace_dispose_workspace
tools.description: Destroy the workspace and its in-memory data; returns a signed disposal receipt.
